overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand Gothic great hall with floating candles, stained glass windows, and students dining at long wooden tables. Sunlight streams through tall windows creating dramatic god rays across the stone floor while characters in robes move through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candle chandeliers

events.description: student in green robes enters from right side and walks across foreground

agents.ego_description: standing still at the side of the hall observing the dining students and hall architecture

notable_agents.action: student in green robes walking from right to left across the foreground

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass windows casting colored light patterns
hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
long wooden house tables lined with dining students
Gothic stone arches and columns along the hall walls
vertical house banners hanging between the windows
polished stone floor reflecting the candlelight and sunbeams

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent Gothic great hall illuminated by morning sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows on the left. Floating candles hover above long wooden dining tables where students in dark robes are seated eating. Around the 6-second mark, a student wearing green robes walks from the right side across the foreground, temporarily obscuring part of the view before exiting left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a magnificent Gothic great hall as morning light and movement breathe life into the space. It begins with a wide view of the hall, where sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows to illuminate floating candles hovering above long wooden dining tables. As students in dark robes dine in the soft light, the stillness of the environment is interrupted by a figure in green robes. This student walks across the foreground from the right, momentarily obscuring the architectural detail before exiting to the left and revealing the grand scale of the room once more.
